title: NASA Space Place: Asteroids
description: A NASA Space Place source card about asteroids, asteroid belts, impacts, and planetary history.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA Space Place introduces asteroids as rocky objects that preserve clues about early solar system formation and sometimes cross paths with planets.
Use this source for risk, probability, geology, and space-mission discussions that require clear nonfiction at an approachable level.
NASA materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some images, partner resources, and logos have separate usage rules. Check item-level rights.
